mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TAG_NAME, TAG_DESC, BLOCK_TYPE, OCCUR_DATE, PROC_TYPE FROM IWSPHALLTAG_TB WHERE OCCUR_DATE LIKE #{startDate} || '%' ORDER BY OCCUR_DATE DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= 10

WITH TAG_LIST AS ( SELECT TAGSN, TAG_NM, TAG_DESC FROM RDITAG_TB WHERE TAGSN BETWEEN 400 AND 417 AND TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), CURRENT_VAL AS ( SELECT R.TAGSN, R.VAL AS CURRENT_VAL FROM RDR01MI_TB R INNER JOIN TAG_LIST T ON R.TAGSN = T.TAGSN WHERE R.LOG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - INTERVAL '1' MINUTE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI') ), ZERO_HOUR_VAL AS ( SELECT R.TAGSN, R.VAL AS ZERO_VAL FROM RDR01MI_TB R INNER JOIN TAG_LIST T ON R.TAGSN = T.TAGSN WHERE R.LOG_TIME = #{today} || '0000' ), YESTERDAY_ZERO_VAL AS ( SELECT R.TAGSN, R.VAL AS YESTERDAY_ZERO_VAL FROM RDR01MI_TB R INNER JOIN TAG_LIST T ON R.TAGSN = T.TAGSN WHERE R.LOG_TIME = #{yesterday} || '0000' ), INVENTORY_MAP AS ( SELECT 'FIQ101' AS USAGE_TAG_NM, 450 AS INV_TAGSN FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'FIQ101', 451 FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'FIQ501', 452 FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'FIQ501', 453 FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'FIQ511', 454 FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'FIQ511', 455 FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'FIQ521', 456 FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'FIQ521', 457 FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'FIQ541A', 466 FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'FIQ541A', 467 FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'FIQ551', 462 FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'FIQ551', 463 FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'FIQ561', 458 FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'FIQ561', 459 FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'FIQ571', 460 FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'FIQ571', 461 FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'FIQ581', 464 FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'FIQ581', 465 FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'FIQ611', 468 FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'FIQ611', 469 FROM DUAL ), INVENTORY_VAL AS ( SELECT IM.USAGE_TAG_NM, ROUND(SUM(NVL(R.VAL, 0)), 2) AS INV_VAL FROM INVENTORY_MAP IM LEFT JOIN RDR01MI_TB R ON R.TAGSN = IM.INV_TAGSN AND R.LOG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - INTERVAL '1' MINUTE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI') GROUP BY IM.USAGE_TAG_NM ) SELECT T.TAGSN, T.TAG_NM, T.TAG_DESC, CASE WHEN (NVL(C.CURRENT_VAL, 0) - NVL(Z.ZERO_VAL, 0)) < 0 THEN NULL ELSE ROUND((NVL(C.CURRENT_VAL, 0) - NVL(Z.ZERO_VAL, 0)) * CASE WHEN T.TAG_NM IN ('FIQ531','FIQ631A','FIQ631B','FIQ631C') THEN 1 ELSE 0.001 END, 4) END AS TODAY_USAGE, CASE WHEN (NVL(Z.ZERO_VAL, 0) - NVL(Y.YESTERDAY_ZERO_VAL, 0)) < 0 THEN NULL ELSE ROUND((NVL(Z.ZERO_VAL, 0) - NVL(Y.YESTERDAY_ZERO_VAL, 0)) * CASE WHEN T.TAG_NM IN ('FIQ531','FIQ631A','FIQ631B','FIQ631C') THEN 1 ELSE 0.001 END, 4) END AS YESTERDAY_USAGE, NVL(IV.INV_VAL, 0) AS INVENTORY_VAL FROM TAG_LIST T LEFT JOIN CURRENT_VAL C ON T.TAGSN = C.TAGSN LEFT JOIN ZERO_HOUR_VAL Z ON T.TAGSN = Z.TAGSN LEFT JOIN YESTERDAY_ZERO_VAL Y ON T.TAGSN = Y.TAGSN LEFT JOIN INVENTORY_VAL IV ON T.TAG_NM = IV.USAGE_TAG_NM ORDER BY T.TAGSN

SELECT ROWNUM AS RANK_NO, A.* FROM ( SELECT TAG_NAME, TAG_DESC, COUNT(*) AS ALM_COUNT FROM IWSPHALLTAG_TB WHERE OCCUR_DATE LIKE #{startDate} || '%' GROUP BY TAG_NAME, TAG_DESC ORDER BY ALM_COUNT DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= 10

WITH WATER_TAG AS ( SELECT TAGSN FROM RDITAG_TB WHERE TAG_NM = 'FIQ481' AND TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), TODAY_BASE AS ( SELECT SUM(VAL) AS BASE_SUM FROM RDR01MI_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM WATER_TAG) AND LOG_TIME = #{date} || '0000' ), YESTERDAY_BASE AS ( SELECT SUM(VAL) AS BASE_SUM FROM RDR01MI_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM WATER_TAG) AND LOG_TIME = #{yesterdayDate} || '0000' ), HOUR_RANGE AS ( SELECT LPAD(LEVEL - 1, 2, '0') AS HH FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24')) + 1 ), TODAY_HOURLY AS ( SELECT HR.HH, (SELECT SUM(VAL) FROM RDR01MI_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM WATER_TAG) AND LOG_TIME = #{date} || HR.HH || '00') AS HOUR_SUM FROM HOUR_RANGE HR ), YESTERDAY_HOURLY AS ( SELECT HR.HH, (SELECT SUM(VAL) FROM RDR01MI_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM WATER_TAG) AND LOG_TIME = #{yesterdayDate} || HR.HH || '00') AS HOUR_SUM FROM HOUR_RANGE HR ) SELECT TH.HH AS HOUR_KEY, CASE WHEN (NVL(TH.HOUR_SUM, 0) - NVL(TB.BASE_SUM, 0)) < 0 THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(NVL(TH.HOUR_SUM, 0) - NVL(TB.BASE_SUM, 0), 2) END AS TODAY_VAL, CASE WHEN (NVL(YH.HOUR_SUM, 0) - NVL(YB.BASE_SUM, 0)) < 0 THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(NVL(YH.HOUR_SUM, 0) - NVL(YB.BASE_SUM, 0), 2) END AS YESTERDAY_VAL FROM TODAY_HOURLY TH CROSS JOIN TODAY_BASE TB LEFT JOIN YESTERDAY_HOURLY YH ON TH.HH = YH.HH CROSS JOIN YESTERDAY_BASE YB ORDER BY TH.HH

WITH WATER_TAG AS ( SELECT TAGSN FROM RDITAG_TB WHERE TAG_NM = 'FIQ481' AND TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), DATE_RANGE AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{date}, 'YYYYMMDD') - LEVEL + 1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DAY_KEY FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 30 ), DAILY_DATA AS ( SELECT SUBSTR(R.LOG_TIME, 1, 8) AS DAY_KEY, R.TAGSN, GREATEST(MAX(R.VAL) - MIN(R.VAL), 0) AS DAILY_DELTA FROM RDF01HH_TB R WHERE R.TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM WATER_TAG) AND SUBSTR(R.LOG_TIME, 1, 8) IN (SELECT DAY_KEY FROM DATE_RANGE) GROUP BY SUBSTR(R.LOG_TIME, 1, 8), R.TAGSN ) SELECT DR.DAY_KEY, ROUND(NVL(SUM(DD.DAILY_DELTA), 0), 2) AS TODAY_VAL FROM DATE_RANGE DR LEFT JOIN DAILY_DATA DD ON DR.DAY_KEY = DD.DAY_KEY GROUP BY DR.DAY_KEY ORDER BY DR.DAY_KEY

WITH WATER_TAG AS ( SELECT TAGSN FROM RDITAG_TB WHERE TAG_NM = 'FIQ481' AND TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), MONTH_RANGE AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{date}, 'YYYYMMDD'), - LEVEL + 1), 'YYYYMM') AS MONTH_KEY FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 12 ), MONTHLY_DATA AS ( SELECT SUBSTR(R.LOG_TIME, 1, 6) AS MONTH_KEY, R.TAGSN, GREATEST(MAX(R.VAL) - MIN(R.VAL), 0) AS MONTHLY_DELTA FROM RDF01HH_TB R WHERE R.TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM WATER_TAG) AND SUBSTR(R.LOG_TIME, 1, 6) IN (SELECT MONTH_KEY FROM MONTH_RANGE) GROUP BY SUBSTR(R.LOG_TIME, 1, 6), R.TAGSN ) SELECT MR.MONTH_KEY, ROUND(NVL(SUM(MD.MONTHLY_DELTA), 0), 2) AS TODAY_VAL FROM MONTH_RANGE MR LEFT JOIN MONTHLY_DATA MD ON MR.MONTH_KEY = MD.MONTH_KEY GROUP BY MR.MONTH_KEY ORDER BY MR.MONTH_KEY

WITH WATER_TAG AS ( SELECT TAGSN FROM RDITAG_TB WHERE TAG_NM = 'FIQ481' AND TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), YEAR_RANGE AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{date}, 'YYYYMMDD'), - (LEVEL - 1) * 12), 'YYYY') AS YEAR_KEY FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 5 ), YEARLY_DATA AS ( SELECT SUBSTR(R.LOG_TIME, 1, 4) AS YEAR_KEY, R.TAGSN, GREATEST(MAX(R.VAL) - MIN(R.VAL), 0) AS YEARLY_DELTA FROM RDF01HH_TB R WHERE R.TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM WATER_TAG) AND SUBSTR(R.LOG_TIME, 1, 4) IN (SELECT YEAR_KEY FROM YEAR_RANGE) GROUP BY SUBSTR(R.LOG_TIME, 1, 4), R.TAGSN ) SELECT YR.YEAR_KEY, ROUND(NVL(SUM(YD.YEARLY_DELTA), 0), 2) AS TODAY_VAL FROM YEAR_RANGE YR LEFT JOIN YEARLY_DATA YD ON YR.YEAR_KEY = YD.YEAR_KEY GROUP BY YR.YEAR_KEY ORDER BY YR.YEAR_KEY

WITH POWER_TAG AS ( SELECT TAGSN FROM RDITAG_TB WHERE TAG_NM IN ('COM_EHV101_1_AE', 'COM_EHV101_2_AE', 'COM_EHV401_1_AE', 'COM_EHV401_2_AE') AND TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), WATER_TAG AS ( SELECT TAGSN FROM RDITAG_TB WHERE TAG_NM = 'FIQ481' AND TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), TODAY_PWR_BASE AS ( SELECT SUM(VAL) AS BASE_SUM FROM RDR01MI_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM POWER_TAG) AND LOG_TIME = #{date} || '0000' ), TODAY_WTR_BASE AS ( SELECT SUM(VAL) AS BASE_SUM FROM RDR01MI_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM WATER_TAG) AND LOG_TIME = #{date} || '0000' ), YEST_PWR_BASE AS ( SELECT SUM(VAL) AS BASE_SUM FROM RDR01MI_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM POWER_TAG) AND LOG_TIME = #{yesterdayDate} || '0000' ), YEST_WTR_BASE AS ( SELECT SUM(VAL) AS BASE_SUM FROM RDR01MI_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM WATER_TAG) AND LOG_TIME = #{yesterdayDate} || '0000' ), HOUR_RANGE AS ( SELECT LPAD(LEVEL - 1, 2, '0') AS HH FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24')) + 1 ), TODAY_HOURLY AS ( SELECT HR.HH, (SELECT SUM(VAL) FROM RDR01MI_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM POWER_TAG) AND LOG_TIME = #{date} || HR.HH || '00') AS PWR_SUM, (SELECT SUM(VAL) FROM RDR01MI_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM WATER_TAG) AND LOG_TIME = #{date} || HR.HH || '00') AS WTR_SUM FROM HOUR_RANGE HR ), YEST_HOURLY AS ( SELECT HR.HH, (SELECT SUM(VAL) FROM RDR01MI_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM POWER_TAG) AND LOG_TIME = #{yesterdayDate} || HR.HH || '00') AS PWR_SUM, (SELECT SUM(VAL) FROM RDR01MI_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM WATER_TAG) AND LOG_TIME = #{yesterdayDate} || HR.HH || '00') AS WTR_SUM FROM HOUR_RANGE HR ) SELECT TH.HH AS HOUR_KEY, CASE WHEN (NVL(TH.WTR_SUM, 0) - NVL(TWB.BASE_SUM, 0)) > 0 THEN GREATEST(ROUND((NVL(TH.PWR_SUM, 0) - NVL(TPB.BASE_SUM, 0)) * 1000 / (NVL(TH.WTR_SUM, 0) - NVL(TWB.BASE_SUM, 0)), 4), 0) ELSE 0 END AS TODAY_VAL, CASE WHEN (NVL(YH.WTR_SUM, 0) - NVL(YWB.BASE_SUM, 0)) > 0 THEN GREATEST(ROUND((NVL(YH.PWR_SUM, 0) - NVL(YPB.BASE_SUM, 0)) * 1000 / (NVL(YH.WTR_SUM, 0) - NVL(YWB.BASE_SUM, 0)), 4), 0) ELSE 0 END AS YESTERDAY_VAL FROM TODAY_HOURLY TH CROSS JOIN TODAY_PWR_BASE TPB CROSS JOIN TODAY_WTR_BASE TWB LEFT JOIN YEST_HOURLY YH ON TH.HH = YH.HH CROSS JOIN YEST_PWR_BASE YPB CROSS JOIN YEST_WTR_BASE YWB ORDER BY TH.HH

WITH POWER_TAG AS ( SELECT TAGSN FROM RDITAG_TB WHERE TAG_NM IN ('COM_EHV101_1_AE', 'COM_EHV101_2_AE', 'COM_EHV401_1_AE', 'COM_EHV401_2_AE') AND TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), WATER_TAG AS ( SELECT TAGSN FROM RDITAG_TB WHERE TAG_NM = 'FIQ481' AND TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), DATE_RANGE AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{date}, 'YYYYMMDD') - LEVEL + 1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DAY_KEY FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 30 ), PWR_AGG AS ( SELECT DAY_KEY, SUM(DELTA) AS PWR_TOTAL FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 8) AS DAY_KEY, TAGSN, GREATEST(MAX(VAL) - MIN(VAL), 0) AS DELTA FROM RDF01HH_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM POWER_TAG) AND SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 8) IN (SELECT DAY_KEY FROM DATE_RANGE) GROUP BY SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 8), TAGSN ) GROUP BY DAY_KEY ), WTR_AGG AS ( SELECT DAY_KEY, SUM(DELTA) AS WTR_TOTAL FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 8) AS DAY_KEY, TAGSN, GREATEST(MAX(VAL) - MIN(VAL), 0) AS DELTA FROM RDF01HH_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM WATER_TAG) AND SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 8) IN (SELECT DAY_KEY FROM DATE_RANGE) GROUP BY SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 8), TAGSN ) GROUP BY DAY_KEY ) SELECT DR.DAY_KEY, CASE WHEN NVL(W.WTR_TOTAL, 0) > 0 THEN ROUND(NVL(P.PWR_TOTAL, 0) * 1000 / W.WTR_TOTAL, 4) ELSE 0 END AS TODAY_VAL FROM DATE_RANGE DR LEFT JOIN PWR_AGG P ON DR.DAY_KEY = P.DAY_KEY LEFT JOIN WTR_AGG W ON DR.DAY_KEY = W.DAY_KEY ORDER BY DR.DAY_KEY

WITH POWER_TAG AS ( SELECT TAGSN FROM RDITAG_TB WHERE TAG_NM IN ('COM_EHV101_1_AE', 'COM_EHV101_2_AE', 'COM_EHV401_1_AE', 'COM_EHV401_2_AE') AND TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), WATER_TAG AS ( SELECT TAGSN FROM RDITAG_TB WHERE TAG_NM = 'FIQ481' AND TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), MONTH_RANGE AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{date}, 'YYYYMMDD'), - LEVEL + 1), 'YYYYMM') AS MONTH_KEY FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 12 ), PWR_AGG AS ( SELECT MONTH_KEY, SUM(DELTA) AS PWR_TOTAL FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 6) AS MONTH_KEY, TAGSN, GREATEST(MAX(VAL) - MIN(VAL), 0) AS DELTA FROM RDF01HH_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM POWER_TAG) AND SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 6) IN (SELECT MONTH_KEY FROM MONTH_RANGE) GROUP BY SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 6), TAGSN ) GROUP BY MONTH_KEY ), WTR_AGG AS ( SELECT MONTH_KEY, SUM(DELTA) AS WTR_TOTAL FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 6) AS MONTH_KEY, TAGSN, GREATEST(MAX(VAL) - MIN(VAL), 0) AS DELTA FROM RDF01HH_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM WATER_TAG) AND SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 6) IN (SELECT MONTH_KEY FROM MONTH_RANGE) GROUP BY SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 6), TAGSN ) GROUP BY MONTH_KEY ) SELECT MR.MONTH_KEY, CASE WHEN NVL(W.WTR_TOTAL, 0) > 0 THEN ROUND(NVL(P.PWR_TOTAL, 0) * 1000 / W.WTR_TOTAL, 4) ELSE 0 END AS TODAY_VAL FROM MONTH_RANGE MR LEFT JOIN PWR_AGG P ON MR.MONTH_KEY = P.MONTH_KEY LEFT JOIN WTR_AGG W ON MR.MONTH_KEY = W.MONTH_KEY ORDER BY MR.MONTH_KEY

WITH POWER_TAG AS ( SELECT TAGSN FROM RDITAG_TB WHERE TAG_NM IN ('COM_EHV101_1_AE', 'COM_EHV101_2_AE', 'COM_EHV401_1_AE', 'COM_EHV401_2_AE') AND TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), WATER_TAG AS ( SELECT TAGSN FROM RDITAG_TB WHERE TAG_NM = 'FIQ481' AND TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), YEAR_RANGE AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{date}, 'YYYYMMDD'), - (LEVEL - 1) * 12), 'YYYY') AS YEAR_KEY FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 5 ), PWR_AGG AS ( SELECT YEAR_KEY, SUM(DELTA) AS PWR_TOTAL FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 4) AS YEAR_KEY, TAGSN, GREATEST(MAX(VAL) - MIN(VAL), 0) AS DELTA FROM RDF01HH_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM POWER_TAG) AND SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 4) IN (SELECT YEAR_KEY FROM YEAR_RANGE) GROUP BY SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 4), TAGSN ) GROUP BY YEAR_KEY ), WTR_AGG AS ( SELECT YEAR_KEY, SUM(DELTA) AS WTR_TOTAL FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 4) AS YEAR_KEY, TAGSN, GREATEST(MAX(VAL) - MIN(VAL), 0) AS DELTA FROM RDF01HH_TB WHERE TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM WATER_TAG) AND SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 4) IN (SELECT YEAR_KEY FROM YEAR_RANGE) GROUP BY SUBSTR(LOG_TIME, 1, 4), TAGSN ) GROUP BY YEAR_KEY ) SELECT YR.YEAR_KEY, CASE WHEN NVL(W.WTR_TOTAL, 0) > 0 THEN ROUND(NVL(P.PWR_TOTAL, 0) * 1000 / W.WTR_TOTAL, 4) ELSE 0 END AS TODAY_VAL FROM YEAR_RANGE YR LEFT JOIN PWR_AGG P ON YR.YEAR_KEY = P.YEAR_KEY LEFT JOIN WTR_AGG W ON YR.YEAR_KEY = W.YEAR_KEY ORDER BY YR.YEAR_KEY

WITH CHEM_TAG AS ( SELECT TAGSN, TAG_NM, CASE WHEN TAG_NM IN ('FIQ531','FIQ631A','FIQ631B','FIQ631C') THEN 1 ELSE 0.001 END AS UNIT_FACTOR FROM RDITAG_TB WHERE TAGSN BETWEEN 400 AND 417 AND TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), DATE_RANGE AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{date}, 'YYYYMMDD') - LEVEL + 1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DAY_KEY FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 30 ), DAILY_DATA AS ( SELECT SUBSTR(R.LOG_TIME, 1, 8) AS DAY_KEY, R.TAGSN, GREATEST(MAX(R.VAL) - MIN(R.VAL), 0) AS DAILY_DELTA FROM RDF01HH_TB R WHERE R.TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM CHEM_TAG) AND SUBSTR(R.LOG_TIME, 1, 8) IN (SELECT DAY_KEY FROM DATE_RANGE) GROUP BY SUBSTR(R.LOG_TIME, 1, 8), R.TAGSN ) SELECT DR.DAY_KEY, CT.TAG_NM, ROUND(NVL(DD.DAILY_DELTA, 0) * CT.UNIT_FACTOR, 4) AS USAGE_VAL FROM DATE_RANGE DR CROSS JOIN CHEM_TAG CT LEFT JOIN DAILY_DATA DD ON DR.DAY_KEY = DD.DAY_KEY AND CT.TAGSN = DD.TAGSN ORDER BY DR.DAY_KEY, CT.TAGSN

WITH CHEM_TAG AS ( SELECT TAGSN, TAG_NM, CASE WHEN TAG_NM IN ('FIQ531','FIQ631A','FIQ631B','FIQ631C') THEN 1 ELSE 0.001 END AS UNIT_FACTOR FROM RDITAG_TB WHERE TAGSN BETWEEN 400 AND 417 AND TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), MONTH_RANGE AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{date}, 'YYYYMMDD'), - LEVEL + 1), 'YYYYMM') AS MONTH_KEY FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 12 ), MONTHLY_DATA AS ( SELECT SUBSTR(R.LOG_TIME, 1, 6) AS MONTH_KEY, R.TAGSN, GREATEST(MAX(R.VAL) - MIN(R.VAL), 0) AS MONTHLY_DELTA FROM RDF01HH_TB R WHERE R.TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM CHEM_TAG) AND SUBSTR(R.LOG_TIME, 1, 6) IN (SELECT MONTH_KEY FROM MONTH_RANGE) GROUP BY SUBSTR(R.LOG_TIME, 1, 6), R.TAGSN ) SELECT MR.MONTH_KEY, CT.TAG_NM, ROUND(NVL(MD.MONTHLY_DELTA, 0) * CT.UNIT_FACTOR, 4) AS USAGE_VAL FROM MONTH_RANGE MR CROSS JOIN CHEM_TAG CT LEFT JOIN MONTHLY_DATA MD ON MR.MONTH_KEY = MD.MONTH_KEY AND CT.TAGSN = MD.TAGSN ORDER BY MR.MONTH_KEY, CT.TAGSN

WITH CHEM_TAG AS ( SELECT TAGSN, TAG_NM, CASE WHEN TAG_NM IN ('FIQ531','FIQ631A','FIQ631B','FIQ631C') THEN 1 ELSE 0.001 END AS UNIT_FACTOR FROM RDITAG_TB WHERE TAGSN BETWEEN 400 AND 417 AND TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), YEAR_RANGE AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{date}, 'YYYYMMDD'), - (LEVEL - 1) * 12), 'YYYY') AS YEAR_KEY FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 5 ), YEARLY_DATA AS ( SELECT SUBSTR(R.LOG_TIME, 1, 4) AS YEAR_KEY, R.TAGSN, GREATEST(MAX(R.VAL) - MIN(R.VAL), 0) AS YEARLY_DELTA FROM RDF01HH_TB R WHERE R.TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM CHEM_TAG) AND SUBSTR(R.LOG_TIME, 1, 4) IN (SELECT YEAR_KEY FROM YEAR_RANGE) GROUP BY SUBSTR(R.LOG_TIME, 1, 4), R.TAGSN ) SELECT YR.YEAR_KEY, CT.TAG_NM, ROUND(NVL(YD.YEARLY_DELTA, 0) * CT.UNIT_FACTOR, 4) AS USAGE_VAL FROM YEAR_RANGE YR CROSS JOIN CHEM_TAG CT LEFT JOIN YEARLY_DATA YD ON YR.YEAR_KEY = YD.YEAR_KEY AND CT.TAGSN = YD.TAGSN ORDER BY YR.YEAR_KEY, CT.TAGSN

WITH QUALITY_TAG AS ( SELECT TAGSN, TAG_NM FROM RDITAG_TB WHERE TAGSN BETWEEN 490 AND 494 AND TAG_USE_YN = 'Y' ), LATEST_VAL AS ( SELECT R.TAGSN, R.VAL, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY R.TAGSN ORDER BY R.LOG_TIME DESC) AS RN FROM RDR01MI_TB R WHERE R.TAGSN IN (SELECT TAGSN FROM QUALITY_TAG) AND R.LOG_TIME >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - INTERVAL '10' MINUTE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI') ) SELECT T.TAG_NM, ROUND(NVL(L.VAL, 0), 2) AS CURRENT_VAL FROM QUALITY_TAG T LEFT JOIN LATEST_VAL L ON T.TAGSN = L.TAGSN AND L.RN = 1 ORDER BY T.TAGSN
